item.title: Learning Resource Links
item.description:
Follow below some internet resources list that I use to learn. This post is a curated and organic list.

  • First, a great thanks to all resources responsible cited in this list for sharing their knowledge with us.
  • Any resource suggestions or corrections, let me know.
  • Have a great learning.

Get informed:

  • Social news website about computing and entrepreneurship: Hacker News
  • News source of technology: Slashdot

General Computing/Programming Learning:

  • Several programming courses and certifications: FreeCodeCamp
  • Brazilian Group for new programming learners with challenges and Telegram support chat: OsProgramadores
  • Brazilian computational thinking portal: Computacional
  • Northwestern University Computational tools using Netlogo: CT-STEM
  • Block program language cloud-based tool. Create stories, games and animations: MIT Scratch
  • Create IPhone and Android apps using block program language: MIT App Inventor

Machine Learning / Artificial inteligence:

  • Great machine learning summary: Machine Learning for Everyone
  • Great machine learning plain-english road-map: Machine learning for humans
  • Machine learning and Data Science Community, competition, and Courses: Kaggle
  • Brazilian data science community, with a great Slack community: Data Hackers

Books/booksmarks lists:

  • R language bookmark: Big book of R

  • Computer books list: Online Programming Books

  • Allen Downey books: Green Tea Press

Revision control:

v1 - 22/10/2022 - List started.
